module.name: truthtable
module.description: A logic truth table with colour-coded T/F cells. First section = header (variables / expression), each following section = a row.
module.aiSpec:
A logic TRUTH TABLE. Block module: split the body with `<!-- @ -->`. The FIRST section is the header row; each following section is a row. Separate columns with ` | `. Cells that are `T`/`1`/`true` render green, `F`/`0`/`false` render grey — anything else is shown as-is. Header cells may contain math with \( \) (e.g. \(p \land q\)).
Parameters: color — header background colour (default var(--accent-color)). align — cell text alignment: left | center (default) | right. compact — tighter cell padding for dense tables (default false). truecolor — text colour of the T cells (default "" = green #16a34a). falsecolor — text colour of the F cells (default "" = muted grey).
<!-- @truthtable color: #2563eb, align: center --> \(p\) | \(q\) | \(p \land q\) T | T | T T | F | F F | T | F F | F | F <!-- @end -->

param.name: color
param.label: Header color
param.desc: Background colour of the header row.

param.name: align
param.label: Cell alignment
param.desc: Horizontal alignment of the cell contents.

param.name: compact
param.label: Compact
param.desc: Use tighter cell padding for dense tables.

param.name: truecolor
param.label: True cell color
param.desc: Text colour of T / true cells (blank = default green).

param.name: falsecolor
param.label: False cell color
param.desc: Text colour of F / false cells (blank = default muted grey).

snippet.label: Truth table
snippet.text: <!-- @truthtable --> \(p\) | \(q\) | \(p \to q\) T | T | T T | F | F F | T | T F | F | T <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: First section = header, rows follow; columns split by ` | `. T/F colour-coded.
